'''''Droids'' 2''' is the second issue of [[Star Wars: Droids (1994)|''Star Wars: Droids'' (1994)]], a [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series starring [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. It was published in [[May]] [[1994]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''A gang of interplanetary thieves steal See-Threepio and Artoo-Detoo from the Pitareeze family, and take the droids to Kalarba's moon, Indobok. The droids meet a nefarious character from their past, and realize that their troubles have just begun!''
